---
name: madp-start
description: Start, inspect, import, or recover a MADP v0.3.0-alpha.3 session while preserving command compatibility and revision boundaries.
---
Use `MADP-v0.3.0-alpha.3`. Determine whether the user wants a new session, broad status, detailed session status, file import, resume, or Help. Preserve alpha.2 canonical `status`, `resume`, and `pause`; never reinterpret them as aliases. For new sessions, propose a revision-bound deliberation plan. For imports, create an import report before any state change. Default authority is `PROPOSE_ONLY` unless a valid user command applies.
